questions.q: Which PlayStation version of Dragon Age: Inquisition will have its servers shut down on April 28, 2026?
What is the name of the hacker group that claimed responsibility for the data breach affecting Rockstar Games?
What type of game is Luminids, developed by Luminids Studios?
What is the name of the new content or update for Dome Keeper mentioned in the provided context?
According to a statement by Rockstar Games, what was the impact of the recent data breach?
options: Limited access to non-material company information with no impact on organization or players
The theft of all game source codes
A complete shutdown of all online services
questions.correctText: Limited access to non-material company information with no impact on organization or players
